steps.title: Convert feet to yards
steps.content: Since $3$ feet equal $1$ yard, divide the speed in feet per second by $3$.

steps.title: Apply the conversion
steps.content: Multiply by the conversion factor from feet to yards. $$ \frac{6}{25}\div3=\frac{6}{25}\cdot\frac{1}{3}=\frac{2}{25} $$ The answer is A.
